tasks.title: Phase 0 — repo hygiene + live baseline + smoke-test shipped surfaces
tasks.description:
## Goal
Confirm main clean+pushed, 0 open PRs/issues stragglers, prune merged remote feat/fix/loom-* branches, confirm live console runs latest main (loom-roll-and-validate green for HEAD; trigger roll if not), smoke-test Monitor KQL/Diagnostics/Cost, data-agent tools panel, Copilot usage+build-assist, Governance Access-policy+Classifications.

## Acceptance
Real backend or honest Fluent gate; Azure-native default; guided UI (no raw JSON); tsc clean on touched files; PR merged; console rolled; surface verified live or honest gate shown; docs updated.

tasks.title: Phase 1 — Setup wizard real server-side deploy (no az printout)
tasks.description:
## Goal
Wizard Deploy action calls a BFF route that dispatches the real GitHub deploy workflow (gh/Actions API) and streams status; honest gate if deploy identity/token unconfigured.

## Acceptance
Real backend or honest Fluent gate; Azure-native default; guided UI (no raw JSON); tsc clean on touched files; PR merged; console rolled; surface verified live or honest gate shown; docs updated.

## Depends on: task-001

tasks.title: Phase 1 — deploy-dlz Feature-Permission gate
tasks.description:
## Goal
Add feature-permission capability deploy-dlz (Admin default, owner-delegable) and gate the wizard deploy action.

## Acceptance
Real backend or honest Fluent gate; Azure-native default; guided UI (no raw JSON); tsc clean on touched files; PR merged; console rolled; surface verified live or honest gate shown; docs updated.

## Depends on: task-002

tasks.title: Phase 3 — data-agent EXECUTES its generated query (grounded on real rows)
tasks.description:
## Goal
Run the per-source generated query read-only under caller identity (warehouse/lakehouse/kql/semantic), re-prompt the model with real rows, attach rows+count to tools metadata; honest gate per unreachable source. No mocks.

## Acceptance
Real backend or honest Fluent gate; Azure-native default; guided UI (no raw JSON); tsc clean on touched files; PR merged; console rolled; surface verified live or honest gate shown; docs updated.

tasks.description:
